incidents.detail: Reckless challenge from behind on Israel Reyes; referee immediately shows yellow for dangerous play.
Powerful header from 8 yards out after Orbelín Pineda whips a corner kick to the near post, leaving Hernán Galíndez no chance.
Tactical foul to halt a dangerous Mexico counter-attack down the right wing.
Left-footed curler from 24 yards after intercepting a loose pass in midfield; the ball arcs beautifully past a helpless Galíndez into the top corner.
Booked for dissent after complaining loudly about a referee's decision on the sideline.
Cynical foul to break up Ecuador's rare counterattack attempt in Mexico's defensive third.
